title: Beam Blocks
body:
# 🪵 Beam Blocks: Reinvent Your Structures
The Missing Link in Minecraft Architecture

Have you ever built a massive medieval hall or a deep underground mine, only to feel like something was... missing? Beam Blocks solves the "floating block" syndrome by introducing a wide variety of structural beams designed to give your builds the support they deserve.

Whether you are a professional builder or a survival enthusiast, these beams add a layer of depth and realism that vanilla fences or walls simply cannot provide.

# ✨ Key Features :

   - Complete Wood Palette: No wood type is left behind. From the pale Birch to the deep Dark Oak, and even the exotic Cherry and Bamboo, every wood set has its dedicated beam.

   - Smart Placement: Beams are designed to align perfectly with the grid, allowing for horizontal supports, vertical pillars, and intricate ceiling frameworks.

   - Performance Friendly: Built with optimization in mind, Beam Blocks won't lag your game, even in massive cities or complex industrial zones.

   - Resource Pack Compatible: Our textures are mapped to follow vanilla patterns, meaning they will look great even if you use 32x or 64x texture packs!



<details>
<summary>Supported Languages</summary>
  
# 🌍 Supported Languages :

- **English** : ✅ Native Support
- **Français** : ✅ Support Natif
- **Deutsch** : ⏳ Planned
- **Español** : ⏳ Planned


</details>
